package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for tool_appeasement_noop_type_in_production_package: Production no-op or dummy types that appear to exist mainly to satisfy tooling instead of runtime behavior.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule205NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule205NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule205NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario205Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule205NegativeService, input Rule205NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
